scripts.test: env -u FORCE_COLOR NO_COLOR=1 zsh -c 'preload=../../packages/tooling/src/test-log-preload.ts; bun test --preload $preload --reporter=dots tests/runtime/session-runtime.test.ts & p1=$!; bun test --preload $preload --reporter=dots tests/extensions/auto-integration.test.ts -t "single iteration|multi-iteration|event-store assertions|wedge prevention" & p2=$!; bun test --preload $preload --reporter=dots tests/extensions/auto-integration.test.ts -t "gated mid-sequence|handoff dedup|auto handoff|threshold" & p3=$!; bun test --preload $preload --reporter=dots tests/server/driver-rpc.test.ts tests/server/workspace-rpc.test.ts tests/server/auth-rpc.test.ts tests/server/interaction-commands.test.ts tests/server/rpc-contract.test.ts tests/server/extension-commands-rpc.test.ts tests/utils/run-process.test.ts & p4=$!; find tests -name "*.test.ts" ! -path "tests/runtime/session-runtime.test.ts" ! -path "tests/extensions/auto-integration.test.ts" ! -path "tests/server/driver-rpc.test.ts" ! -path "tests/server/workspace-rpc.test.ts" ! -path "tests/server/auth-rpc.test.ts" ! -path "tests/server/interaction-commands.test.ts" ! -path "tests/server/rpc-contract.test.ts" ! -path "tests/server/extension-commands-rpc.test.ts" ! -path "tests/utils/run-process.test.ts" -print0 | xargs -0 -n 4 -P 4 bun test --preload $preload --reporter=dots; c=$?; wait $p1; c1=$?; wait $p2; c2=$?; wait $p3; c3=$?; wait $p4; c4=$?; exit $((c || c1 || c2 || c3 || c4))'
